channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Apple’s global Formula One streaming ambitions face delays due to existing broadcaster contracts
item.description: Apple has secured a five-year deal to stream Formula One races in the United States on Apple TV, marking a significant step into live sports broadcasting. However, expanding this globally could take c...

item.title: Gazini Ganados participates in the inaugural MGI All Stars swimsuit competition
item.description: Filipino beauty queen Gazini Ganados made a stunning appearance at the inaugural MGI All Stars swimsuit event held as part of the Miss Grand International All Stars pageant activities. Known for her p...

item.title: M&S criticises proposed supermarket price caps amid profit recovery following cyber-attack
item.description: Marks & Spencer’s chief executive, Stuart Machin, has criticised government proposals for supermarket price caps, describing them as 'completely preposterous'. Machin highlighted that M&S had not been...

item.title: Toronto man found not criminally responsible for violent acts granted escorted city visits
item.description: Kenroy Samuel, a Toronto resident diagnosed with schizophrenia, major depressive disorder, and cannabis use disorder, was found not criminally responsible for stabbing a woman and killing his brother ...

item.title: Analysis of Canadian Bank Stocks, Industrial REITs, and Copper Market Trends
item.description: Scott Barlow, Market Strategist at The Globe and Mail, presents a comprehensive overview of recent research on Canadian financial markets. Bank of America analyst Ebrahim Poonawala highlighted TD Bank...

item.title: India and Italy Strengthen Bilateral Ties with Special Strategic Partnership
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi, during the final leg of his five-nation tour, visited Italy and held extensive discussions with Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and President Sergio Mattarella. The...

item.title: CCM Women's Wing Leader Mary Chatanda Under Fire for Saying She Would Eliminate CHADEMA if Given Power
item.description: Mary Chatanda, who is the national chairperson of the ruling Chama Cha Mapinduzi (CCM) women's wing, has caused big anger among many Tanzanians after her speech on 18th May 2026 in Migoli village, Iri...

item.title: Comelec warns candidates on premature campaigning ahead of barangay and SK elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has issued a stern warning to candidates for the upcoming barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) elections regarding premature campaigning. Chairman George Erwin ...

item.title: House of Representatives passes anti-political dynasty bill on second reading
item.description: The House of Representatives has approved the anti-political dynasty bill on its second reading, marking a significant step toward limiting the influence of family-based political control in the Phili...

item.title: PUBG MOBILE Version 4.4 Brings Mythology-Themed Mode and Gameplay Enhancements
item.description: PUBG MOBILE don drop im Version 4.4 update wey dey shake the gaming world. This new update introduce plenty new tins, including Hero's Crown, a Greek mythology-themed mode wey go make players test the...

item.title: TPSF Encourages Tanzanian Entrepreneurs to Invest Locally Amid Record FDI Inflows
item.description: The Tanzania Private Sector Federation (TPSF) has published a Strategic Policy Note urging local business people to move from just trading goods to investing in productive sectors, especially as Forei...

item.title: Trump's Primary Endorsements and Policy Priorities Spark Internal GOP Concerns Ahead of 2026 Midterms
item.description: According to a NOTUS report, President Donald Trump is prioritizing personal and loyalist-focused decisions that some Republicans fear could jeopardize the party's narrow majorities in the House and S...

item.title: China Calls for Ceasefire Amid Iran-Israel Tensions; U.S. Signals Possible Peace Talks
item.description: On May 20, 2026, tensions in West Asia remain high as the Iran-Israel conflict continues. Chinese President Xi Jinping, during discussions with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Beijing, stressed th...

item.title: Putin meets Xi in Beijing to deepen Russia-China strategic partnership
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin visited Beijing to meet with Chinese President Xi Jinping, highlighting the growing strategic partnership between Russia and China amid global tensions. The visit come...

item.title: Lahore Restores Historical Names and Heritage Sites to Revive Cultural Legacy
item.description: Lahore, one of Pakistan's major cities, is undergoing a significant cultural restoration project nearly 80 years after the partition. The Lahore Heritage Area Revival (LHAR) initiative, launched in 20...

item.title: UK Deputy Ambassador to US Resigns Following Investigation into Iran War Leak
item.description: James Roscoe, the United Kingdom's deputy ambassador to the United States, has left his position unexpectedly. Roscoe had served in the role since July 2022 and temporarily stepped in as acting ambass...

item.title: Armed Attackers Kidnap Pupils From Oyo Schools, Use Principal to Drive Them Into Forest
item.description: For Oyo State, wahala don tey as armed kidnappers don attack two rural communities, Esiele and Yawota, terrorising schools and residents. Micheal Ojo, one local farmer wey suffer as four of him pikin,...

item.title: Putin and Xi reaffirm strong diplomatic ties following Trump’s visit
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin and Chinese President Xi Jinping met recently to emphasize the strength and resilience of their bilateral relationship, calling it 'unyielding' even amid shifting glob...

item.title: USTDA to Support Installation of 1,500 Mobile Base Stations Across West Africa
item.description: The United States Trade and Development Agency (USTDA) don arrange to support deployment of American-made wireless technology for Nigeria plus three oda West African countries including Benin, Côte d’...

item.title: Abhishek Banerjee Responds to Kolkata Civic Property Notices, Vows Legal Fight
item.description: In a recent development in West Bengal politics, Trinamool Congress MP Abhishek Banerjee has publicly stated that he will continue his political battle against the BJP despite Kolkata municipal author...
